case_title: CHATHAM, BARRY W vs. SALADIN WESTCO, INC. DBA MEGAWATS OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHATHAM, BARRY W AS TO DEFENDANT SALADIN WESTCO, INC. DBA MEGAWATS OF SAN FRANCISCO
